scenes.title: 廉颇不服
scenes.prompt: A general angry at being outranked, cartoon style, pride scene
scenes.narration: 廉颇觉得自己功劳大，不服蔺相如。

scenes.title: 蔺相如避让
scenes.prompt: A wise minister avoiding conflict, cartoon style, humble scene
scenes.narration: 蔺相如为了国家大局，处处避让廉颇。

scenes.title: 负荆请罪
scenes.prompt: A general carrying thorns to apologize, cartoon style, reconciliation scene
scenes.narration: 廉颇深受感动，背着荆条去请罪，两人成为好友。
